description_long: This is a two-story hotel building with a light-colored stucco exterior and a dark blue, hipped roof bordered by reddish-brown trim. The front facade features a prominent sign reading 'HOTEL DE VILLE' mounted above a recessed entrance with double doors framed in white stone. Ornate black wrought-iron railings enclose a balcony on the upper floor, which wraps around one corner of the building. Several windows with white frames and curtains are symmetrically arranged on both floors, and a patch of green climbing ivy ascends one side wall. The side of the building displays some weathering and exposed brickwork, adding character to the structure. A single chimney and a downspout are visible on the roof and side, respectively.
description: A two-story hotel with a stucco facade, blue hipped roof, wrought-iron balcony, and a prominent 'HOTEL DE VILLE' sign above the main entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three windows, and the balcony with ornate railing.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the 'HOTEL DE VILLE' sign, entrance, and climbing ivy on the side wall.
description_view_2: Side view displaying four windows, a large patch of exposed brick, and the full extent of the ivy.
description_view_3: Rear/side view showing a single window, the downspout, and the back of the balcony.
attribute_hotel_signage: Large red and white 'HOTEL DE VILLE' sign mounted on the front facade above the entrance.
